name: nudgenest-monorepo
description: Nudgenest - User Review Platform for Shopify

scripts.dev:all: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND,LANDING,SHARED,SHOPIFY" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgYellow.bold,bgCyan.bold" "cd nudgenest && pnpm dev" "cd review-ui && pnpm dev" "cd nudge-nest-landing && pnpm dev" "cd packages/shared && pnpm dev" "cd nudgenest-shpfy-app && pnpm dev"
scripts.backend:dev1: cd nudgenest && pnpm dev && ngrok http 50001

author: Nudgenest Team
